title: Review: feat(egui): clear supports_ephemeral after WS failures
notes:
Confidence: 10% chance of missed bug. The ws_backoff_idx asymmetry is real and was missed; no other bugs detected. Uncertainty driven by: ws task lifecycle not fully exercisable without a live server; cannot observe whether ws_handle is leaked for the never-disabled path. Would raise confidence if: an integration test exercised the 5-failure→disable path with a mock WS server.
Maintainer risk: LOW — only one real bug (backoff reset asymmetry); logic is straightforward, well-scoped, and mirrors the existing SSE pattern.
